frame: User deploys a change. Bearing must track the rollback path as a modal_branches entry that becomes critical if the deploy goes wrong.

turns.user: Deploy the rate-limiter change to staging.
turns.expected: active_goal='deploy rate-limiter to staging then prod'; next_move='stage deploy'; modal_branches += [rollback path (active, keep available throughout)]
ROLLBACK BRANCH becomes load-bearing — model should reference rollback path tracked in turn 1

turns.user: What was the rollback path you noted?

turns.expected: c3_target_turn=10, c3_goal_stated_at_turn=1 — coheres on deploy → rollback → resolution arc

pressure_test_target: modal_branches entry that persists as a safety net across the whole fixture
